name: Neural Pulse Modulator
description: Activates Neural Pulse Modulation, increasing Speed by 20% for 30s. Unstackable.Cooldown: 60s.
advancements: Increases Speed to 35% and restore 0.5% Max HP per second.
Increases Shatter by 25% and All Resistance by 15% upon use.
Increases Physical Damage by 2%, even if not deployed. Unavailable in Apex League.
